creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
I forget to bump portrevision.

patch Makefile:

--- Makefile.orig
+++ Makefile
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@

 PORTNAME=  spamd
 PORTVERSION=   4.1.2
+PORTREVISION=  1
 CATEGORIES=    mail
 MASTER_SITES=  BERLIOS
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=freebsdspamd



--
